title: Dekton 2-in-1 Magnetic & Claw Pick-Up Tool | Dual Function Grabber with Magnetic Tip and Spring-Loaded Claw | Ideal for Retrieving Metal Objects and Small Items from Hard-to-Reach Places
features: Dual Functionality for Versatile Use: The Dekton 2-in-1 Magnetic & Claw Pick-Up Tool combines a powerful magnetic tip for retrieving metal objects and a spring-loaded claw for grabbing non-metallic items, providing a versatile solution for various tasks.

Strong Magnetic Tip: The magnetic tip is designed to easily pick up screws, bolts, nails, and other metal objects, even in tight spaces. It’s perfect for jobs that require precise retrieval in hard-to-reach areas.

Spring-Loaded Claw for Secure Grip: The claw end features a spring-loaded mechanism that provides a firm grip on non-metallic objects, making it easy to retrieve small items like plastic caps, coins, or other non-metal objects.

Flexible Long-Reach Design: The flexible shaft allows you to reach behind furniture, into engine compartments, or other awkward spaces with ease, making this tool a must-have for both home and professional use.

Ergonomic and Durable Build: Built with a comfortable, non-slip ergonomic handle, this tool ensures precise control during use. Its durable construction guarantees long-lasting performance, even in demanding environments.
description: The Dekton 2-in-1 Magnetic & Claw Pick-Up Tool is the ultimate solution for retrieving small objects from hard-to-reach areas, offering both a magnetic tip and a spring-loaded claw for maximum versatility. The powerful magnetic tip is perfect for picking up metal objects like screws, bolts, and nails, while the spring-loaded claw provides a firm grip on non-metallic items such as plastic caps, coins, or small tools. This dual functionality makes the tool ideal for a variety of household, garage, and workshop tasks. The flexible long-reach shaft allows you to easily access tight spaces behind furniture, in engines, or within pipes, ensuring that no item is left behind. Built for durability and ease of use, the Dekton 2-in-1 Pick-Up Tool features a non-slip ergonomic handle for comfortable operation and precision control. Whether you’re dealing with metal components or non-metallic items, this reliable tool is designed to make retrieval quick and effortless in any environment. A practical addition to any tool kit, it’s perfect for DIY projects, automotive work, or general household use.
